English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Joan Ormondroyd papers
Ormondroyd, Joan.
13-10-3147
1.8 cubic feet. 1.8 cubic feet.
1976-1990. Correspondence, speeches, publications, videocassesttes, and information on various conferences and workshops related to Ormondroyd's work as head of reference and instruction at Uris Library, Cornell University; including her work on bibliographic instruction. Collection material in English <<<<<<< HEAD 4 ======= 4 >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab 4029861
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
RMC Staff
Date completed:
April 2018
EAD encoding:
RMC Staff, April 2018
Date modified:
Kristen Reichenbach, April 2018
BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
Librarian, Cornell University.
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Correspondence, speeches, publications, videocassesttes, and information on various conferences and workshops related to Ormondroyd's work as head of reference and instruction at Uris Library, Cornell University; including her work on bibliographic instruction.
SERIES LIST
Series I. Print Materials
Series II. Media
Cite As:
Joan Ormondroyd Papers, #13-10-3147. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Library orientation. Librarians -- New York (State). Videocassettes. Cornell University -- : Libraries. Cornell University. Library
